subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet sent down in truth, calling all unto God, the Lord of the worlds, and counselling all to justice and fairness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل بالحق و یدع الکل الی الله رب العالمین و یوصی الکل بالعدل و الانصاف و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
